title: acrocarpus grandis
intro: Acrocarpus grandis, also known as the rain tree or red rain tree, is a species of tree in the family Fabaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, coughs, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Acrocarpus grandis can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
